templates.name: C-Level Worker Contract
templates.description: Default delegable Company.OS worker item with a parseable Worker Issue Contract.

variables.TITLE: C-Level Worker Contract
variables.BLOCKED_ACTIONS: No Plane Done, no push, no merge, no deploy, no production write, no secrets, no Linear writes.
variables.REPORTING: Plane worker.reported with changed files, commands/results, blockers, reflection, learning_proposals and artifact paths.

templates.name: CAO Audit Item
templates.description: Separate CAO review seat. CAO verifies, rejects, or parks; CAO does not build.

variables.TITLE: CAO Audit Item
variables.ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA: - Audit verdict is PASS, REJECT, or PARK with evidence.
variables.GATES:
- Read source artifacts
- Verify contract, report, gates and human-gate boundaries
- Produce controller-readable verdict
variables.REPORTING: Plane controller.verdict or CAO audit report with findings, evidence, residual risk and blocked actions.

templates.name: HG-4 Founder Review
templates.description: Founder decision packet for strategic, non-restorable or true founder-will actions.

variables.TITLE: HG-4 Founder Review
variables.BLOCKED_ACTIONS: No worker dispatch beyond the signed boundary, no Plane Done, no claim approval, no deploy, no publish, no production write.
variables.REPORTING: Founder signs or rejects in Plane with founder.sign YAML.

templates.body_markdown:
## Purpose

${TITLE}

## Decision Needed

Review the packet and choose one of:

${DECISION_OPTIONS}

## Worker Issue Contract

```yaml
role: role:cao
parent_seat: role:cao
agent: human
mode: review
workspace: ${WORKSPACE}
dispatch: manual
source_of_truth:
${SOURCE_OF_TRUTH}
acceptance_criteria:
  - Founder decision is posted as founder.sign YAML.
gates:
  - Source packet exists and names blocked actions.
  - Decision options are explicit.
  - Rollback or rework path is named.
human_gate: HG-4
BlockedActions: ${BLOCKED_ACTIONS}
reporting: ${REPORTING}
```

## Sign Template

```yaml
founder.sign:
  work_item: <COMPA-###>
  verdict: APPROVE | APPROVE_WITH_CHANGES | REJECT
  reason: <required for APPROVE_WITH_CHANGES or REJECT>
  signed_at: <ISO-8601>
```

templates.name: Goal Parent
templates.description: Parent item for /goal command work. Not directly dispatched.

variables.CHILDREN:
- Child 1: define worker contract
- Child 2: run worker
- Child 3: synthesize and release-gate

templates.name: Founder Daily Queue Page
templates.description: Daily Founder decision surface for HG-4 and HG-3.5 pending items.
templates.body_markdown:
# Founder Daily Queue — ${DATE}

Source artifact: `${QUEUE_ARTIFACT}`

## Primary Queue

Paste the generated queue contents here.

## Rules

- Sign/reject in the original Plane work item, not on this page.
- No Done transitions from this page.
- Keep daily queue to <= 10 primary items.
- Use this page as a decision cockpit, not as memory.

templates.name: Company.OS Client Install
templates.description: Seed project template for a new Company.OS implementation.
templates.body_markdown:
# ${CLIENT_NAME} — Company.OS Install

Identifier: `${PROJECT_IDENTIFIER}`

## First Goal

${FIRST_GOAL}

## Seed Work Items

1. Company discovery brief
2. Plane labels/states/views check
3. Worker contract template install
4. Capability registry scaffold
5. First read-only worker pilot
6. Founder daily queue setup
7. Release/readiness gate

## Required Pages

- Project Overview
- Founder Daily Queue
- Capability Registry
- Release / Gate Ledger

## Rules

- Plane is execution ledger.
- Worker and CAO do not mark Done.
- HumanGate boundaries are explicit before runtime dispatch.
